name: Storm Knight
bio: Defending champion with a relentless aggressive playstyle. Known for high-risk, high-reward decision making under pressure.

name: Nova Blaze
bio: A masterful tactician from Japan. Nova Blaze reads opponents like open books and exploits every opening with precision timing.

name: Frost Viper
bio: South Korea's top-ranked defensive specialist. Frost Viper's impenetrable setups have never been fully cracked in live tournament play.

name: Titan Rush
bio: Brazil's power player. Titan Rush overwhelms opponents with sheer firepower, turning any round into a pure mechanical showcase.

name: Shadow Rex
bio: Germany's tactical genius. Shadow Rex is patient, calculated, and exploits psychological pressure as a core weapon.

name: Solar Pyre
bio: South Africa's rising star. Solar Pyre's unpredictable playstyle keeps opponents guessing from the first second of every match.

name: Iron Hawk
bio: A seasoned veteran with championship pedigree. Iron Hawk's long-range control and game sense make them a constant threat from any position.

name: Void Echo
bio: France's wildcard entry and this season's biggest surprise. Void Echo's mind-bending mid-round resets have stolen victories from far superior opponents.

name: Thunder Axe
bio: Australia's exciting newcomer. Thunder Axe hit the scene with raw aggression and improving mechanics that make veterans take notice every round.
